description: Two separate vote lists. `corrections` covers pending reviewer corrections; `rules` covers pending rule proposals. Both arrays are required. Use empty array when nothing to vote on in that category.

corrections.description: One vote per pending reviewer correction.

id.description: The pending correction's id, copied verbatim.

reason.description: Required when verdict=reject. One short prose line stating why.

rules.description: One vote per pending rule proposal.

id.description: The pending rule proposal's id, copied verbatim.

text.description: Required when verdict=accept. The final wording, picked or reworded from the proposal/alternatives.

reason.description: Required when verdict=reject. One short prose line stating why.

examples.title: Both pending corrections and pending rule proposals exist

corrections.reason: Out of scope for this iteration's demo target.

rules.text: Stay fully self-contained: system fonts only, no third-party requests.

rules.reason: Conflicts with rule.1 on third-party CDN policy.

examples.title: Only pending corrections, no pending rule proposals
